cancellation: Cancellations made 7 days or more before check-in are fully refunded. Within 7 days, 50% of the total amount is non-refundable.
house_rules: No loud noise after 10:00 PM. No smoking inside the rooms. Pets are not allowed. Maximum occupancy per room must be observed.
check_in: Standard check-in is at 2:00 PM. Early check-in may be arranged depending on availability. Please message us in advance.
check_out: Check-out is at 11:00 AM. Late check-out until 2:00 PM may be arranged for an additional fee.
payment: A downpayment is required to confirm your reservation. Send proof of payment via our Facebook or Instagram. Remaining balance is due upon check-in.
